choose.when: AND DATE(u.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)

mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active, SUM(CASE WHEN u.is_active = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspended, 0 AS expired, SUM(CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 AND up.gender = '남자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS maleActive, SUM(CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 AND up.gender = '여자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS femaleActive, 0 AS maleExpired, 0 AS femaleExpired FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'MEMBER'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS newJoin FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'MEMBER'

SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(enrolled) AS enrolled FROM class_session
AND status='OPEN'
AND class_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
AND DATE_FORMAT(class_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m')
AND class_date=#{date}
GROUP BY category

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='MEMBERSHIP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS membership, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='GROUP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS groupClass, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='PT' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='LOCKER' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS locker, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='ITEM' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS items, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total FROM sale s
AND s.sale_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
AND DATE_FORMAT(s.sale_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m')
AND s.sale_date=#{date}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN up.gender='남자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenMale, SUM(CASE WHEN up.gender='여자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenFemale FROM member_freeze f JOIN users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE #{date} BETWEEN f.freeze_start AND f.freeze_end
